notes: Dorchester composite — 2nd generation UK special armor, successor to Chobham. Ceramic/composite layered modules in steel cavity. RHAe ~2.3-2.7 per mm vs KE. Used in Challenger 2 turret and hull. Enhanced protection vs shaped charges and APFSDS. Developed by DERA; precise composition classified.

source.reference: Classified UK MoD armor program, open-source analysis
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from Challenger 2 reported protection levels vs known threats (APFSDS, HEAT). Value 2.5 is approximate improvement over original Chobham. Precise composition classified.
